info.name: Gym Platform - Complete API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Gym Management Platform.

MICROSERVICES:
  Auth Service        → {{auth_url}}         port 8081
  Training Service    → {{training_url}}     port 8082
  Tracking Service    → {{tracking_url}}     port 8083
  Notification Svc    → {{notification_url}} port 8084
  API Gateway         → {{gateway_url}}      port 8080

SETUP:
  1. Run docker-compose up
  2. Call Login to get a JWT token
  3. Set {{user_id}} and {{auth_token}} variables
  4. All requests use X-User-Id: {{user_id}}
